description: The finding already includes explicit values: 'For Sₙ with n=20, max absolute row/column orthogonality error is 8.2×10⁻⁹ × n!; for n=30, maximum error is 6.7×10⁻⁷ × n!. Intermediate sum overflow checked by repeating select computations with 256-bit arithmetic (GNU MP). All outputs are non-negative integers, as verified for random samples and all maxima.' All three requested items (error for n=20, error for n=30, overflow safeguards) are present.
action_taken: Reviewer concern already addressed in finding text. Marked resolved.
